steps.title: Recognize the operation
steps.content:
25% greater than 80 means the new number is 125% of the original, or 1.25 times the original. We need to calculate:
$$80 \times 1.25$$

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
$$80 \times 1.25 = 100$$
The multiplier $1.25$ includes the original 80 plus the additional 25%, so B is correct.
